title: Tôjin Okichi
overview: Tōjin Okichi is a 1930 film by Kenji Mizoguchi based on the novel by Gisaburo Juichiya.  Only 4 minutes have survived. The fragment has been published on DVD coupled with The Downfall of Osen (1935) by Digital MEME in 2007.

trailers.title: Dance scene from Tojin Okichi (Okichi, Mistress of a Foreigner). Dir: Kenji Mizoguchi, 1930.
